results.title: Rozgar Mela: Recruits from Bihar, J’khand, C’garh thank govt for appointment letters
results.description: New Delhi, May 23 (SocialNews.XYZ) As Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday distributed appointment letters to newly recruited candidates under the 19th edition of the Rozgar Mela, newly-appointed youths across several states spoke to IANS... The post Rozgar Mela: Recruits from Bihar, J’khand, C’garh thank govt for appointment letters appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Han Dong-hoon: "Backing Park Min-sik Equals Voting for Ha Jung-woo"
results.description: Independent candidate Han Dong-hoon held an intensive rally in Busan's Buk-gu, declaring victory would complete conservative reconstruction and urging supporters not to back PPP's Park Min-sik.

results.title: Veera Pasi's ancestral village of Lodhwari in Raebareli, and (inset) Rahul Gandhi inaugurating Veera's statue
results.description: With their eyes on the substantial Pasi vote in Awadh and Purvanchal regions, the political parties are out to woo members of the community.
